title: Projects — Jude Hill
description: Explore side projects, experiments, and tools by Jude Hill, from in-progress ideas to shipped web products.

blocks.title: Projects
blocks.subtitle: A collection of apps, tools, and experiments I'm building on the side. Some are shipping, some are in progress, all are things I wanted to exist.

items.title: Coming soon
items.body: An app I'm currently working on. Details and a link will land here soon.

blocks.heading: Got an idea worth building?
blocks.body: If you're working on something and want a collaborator or a second set of eyes, get in touch.
